description.content: Endpoints that require no authentication
Returns available categories, tags, difficulties, question types, and aggregate stats. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.

Returns the full Topic → Category hierarchy with quiz counts and popular tags per category. Use the returned category `id` as the `categoryId` when creating quizzes. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.
Browse and search published quizzes
Returns a paginated list of published, approved quizzes (plus your own). Supports filtering by category, difficulty, tags, and free-text topic search.

query.description: Free-text search in title, description, and tags
Sort order: popular (plays desc), newest (created desc), or title (alphabetical asc)
Number of results to skip for pagination

response.name: Quizzes retrieved successfully

Create a new quiz. Requires a Starter or Pro plan (admins are exempt). Quiz creation limits are enforced per plan. Admins can set `featured: true` to display the quiz in the Practice section immediately. Non-admin users can add `featured` in the body but it will be silently ignored.

Returns full details for a single quiz including all questions and answers. Only published quizzes that are approved or owned by the API key holder are returned.

response.name: Quiz retrieved successfully

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieve questions for quizzes or browse across all quizzes

Two modes: (1) Pass `quiz_id` to get ordered questions for a specific quiz. (2) Omit `quiz_id` to browse questions across all published quizzes with pagination, filtering, and optional randomization. Only approved quizzes and your own quizzes are included.

query.description: If provided, returns questions for this quiz (Mode 1). If omitted, enters browse mode (Mode 2).
Set to "true" to include answers (Mode 1 only). In browse mode, answers are always included.
Filter by quiz category. Supports comma-separated values for multiple categories (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.
Filter by difficulty. Supports comma-separated values (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.
Filter by question type. Supports comma-separated values. Browse mode only.
Comma-separated tags to match (browse mode only)
Max questions to return per page in browse mode (1–50)
Number of questions to skip for pagination (browse mode only)
Set to "true" to shuffle the returned questions randomly (browse mode only)

Import multiple questions into an existing quiz at once. Validates all questions before inserting — if any fail validation, the entire batch is rejected. Questions are appended after existing questions. **Requires a paid plan (Starter or Pro) or admin role.**
